title: ML Engineer — Enterprise
description: You're an ML Engineer in the data science team at a large Australian enterprise. You build models that predict customer churn, detect fraud, optimise pricing, and personalise recommendations. The work is impactful but operates within strict compliance, security, and governance frameworks.

schedule.activity: Check model monitoring dashboards — data drift alerts, prediction accuracy trends
Team standup — data science team of 8, discuss sprint progress
Feature engineering for the customer churn prediction model — join datasets, create lag features
Model governance meeting — present model card for review before production deployment
Train and evaluate 3 model variants — XGBoost, LightGBM, and a neural net. Compare on holdout set
Work with the data engineering team on a new data pipeline for real-time features
Write unit tests for the feature engineering code, update CI pipeline
Stakeholder meeting — present model results to the product director, explain precision/recall tradeoffs in business terms
Update Confluence documentation, plan tomorrow's work

responsibilities: Build and maintain ML models for business-critical applications
Work within model governance and compliance frameworks
Translate business problems into ML solutions
Collaborate with data engineers on feature pipelines
Monitor models in production and retrain as needed
Document models with model cards and audit trails
Ensure fairness, bias, and explainability requirements are met
challenges: Slow deployment cycles due to governance and compliance
Legacy systems and data quality issues
Explaining ML to non-technical stakeholders and executives
Strict security requirements (no cloud? on-prem GPUs only?)
Data access restrictions and privacy requirements
rewards: Stable, well-compensated career with clear progression
Work on high-impact business problems (fraud detection = real money saved)
Learn to work within enterprise constraints — valuable skill
Good work-life balance compared to startups
careerPath: Head of Data Science / AI Director — 10+ years
